_INSTRUCTIONS: Add this schema to each WooCommerce product page. Replace all [PLACEHOLDERS]. Best approach: Install 'Yoast WooCommerce SEO' plugin which auto-generates Product schema from WooCommerce product data. If doing manually, add via Code Snippets plugin or theme functions.php.
name: [PRODUCT NAME, e.g., SIC4310 NFC Tag IC]
category: [e.g., NFC Tag IC / Industrial IoT / Animal ID]
